name: Payment Information Export
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers can be exported into a CSV (comma separated values) file so that you can manually report or import into a third party system. You can also export customer lists to make changes, and then import back into Neto. There's 2 ways to export your customer details:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Complex Export"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The complex export wizard is the only way to export payment information, as there is no simple export method."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Neto does not store credit card information. Only the first and last digits of the card number will be exported."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the complex export wizard:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Export data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Order Payments", "bold": true}, {"text": " radio button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform complex export", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and choose the "}, {"text": "Start Data Export Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": " option."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a name for your file and click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You now need to choose which payment fields you want to export. Click the "}, {"text": "Add New Field To File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and choose the fields from the drop down menus."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You need to select a field type first (payment details) and then choose the field name."}]}]}]}]
